title: Browse UI: entry + recent feed + search
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want a /browse entry view so that I can see what's in the brain at a glance and navigate into it.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/routes/browse/+page.svelte renders: search box at top, chronological episode feed below
Search uses the GET /api/graph/search endpoint (debounced as the user types)
Recent feed uses GET /api/graph/recent with infinite scroll (load more as the user reaches the bottom)
Each result row is a clickable summary that opens the entity card or episode detail
Mobile-first: works on phone with touch-friendly hit targets
Verify: phone test — the feed loads, scrolls smoothly past the first page, and search-as-you-type returns results within a couple hundred ms
